FLEX_POWER.title: Flex
FLEX_POWER.description: Gain {Amount} Strength. At the end of your turn, lose {Amount} Strength.
COMBUST_POWER_C.title: Combust
COMBUST_POWER_C.description: At the end of your turn, lose 1 HP and deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
EVOLVE_POWER_C.title: Evolve
EVOLVE_POWER_C.description: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw {Amount} cards.
FIRE_BREATHING_POWER_C.title: Fire Breathing
FIRE_BREATHING_POWER_C.description: Whenever you draw a Status or Curse card, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
METALLICIZE_POWER_C.title: Metallicize
METALLICIZE_POWER_C.description: At the end of your turn, gain {Amount} Block.
BERSERK_POWER_C.title: Berserk
BERSERK_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Amount} Energy.
BRUTALITY_POWER_C.title: Brutality
BRUTALITY_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, lose 1 HP and draw {Amount} cards.
A_THOUSAND_CUTS_POWER.title: A Thousand Cuts
A_THOUSAND_CUTS_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, deal {Amount} damage to ALL enemies.
CHOKE_HOLD_POWER.title: Choke
CHOKE_HOLD_POWER.description: Whenever the player plays a card this turn, this enemy loses {Amount} HP.
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.title: Corpse Explosion
CORPSE_EXPLOSION_POWER.description: On death, deal damage equal to Max HP to ALL enemies.
PHANTASMAL_KILLER_POWER.title: Phantasmal Killer
ELECTRODYNAMICS_POWER_C.title: Electrodynamics
STATIC_DISCHARGE_POWER_C.title: Static Discharge
STATIC_DISCHARGE_POWER_C.description: Whenever you receive attack damage, Channel {Amount} Lightning.
CREATIVE_AI_POWER_C.title: Creative AI
CREATIVE_AI_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, add {Amount} random Power cards into your hand.
HELLO_WORLD_POWER_C.title: Hello World
HELLO_WORLD_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, add a random Common card into your hand.
STORM_POWER_C.title: Storm
STORM_POWER_C.description: Whenever you play a Power card, Channel {Amount} Lightning.
MACHINE_LEARNING_POWER_C.title: Machine Learning
MACHINE_LEARNING_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, draw {Amount} additional cards.
SELF_REPAIR_POWER_C.title: Self Repair
SELF_REPAIR_POWER_C.description: At the end of combat, heal {Amount} HP.
LOOP_POWER_C.title: Loop
LOOP_POWER_C.description: At the start of your turn, trigger the passive ability of your next Orb {Amount} times.
HEATSINKS_POWER_C.title: Heatsinks
HEATSINKS_POWER_C.description: Whenever you play a Power card, draw {Amount} cards.
ECHO_FORM_POWER_C.title: Echo Form
ECHO_FORM_POWER_C.description: The first card you play each turn is played twice.
